sections.section_purpose: To describe the technical approach to meet the requirements.
sections.response_guidance: Describe how the supplier will operate within the defined technical environment and meet service attributes and application requirements.

sections.section_purpose: To outline the security framework and compliance obligations.
sections.response_guidance: Describe compliance with security obligations, including probity, conflict of interest, and Defence policies and standards.

sections.section_purpose: To detail the project management and governance structure.
sections.response_guidance: Describe participation in meetings and compliance with governance frameworks.

sections.section_purpose: To describe the service management framework and performance management.
sections.response_guidance: Detail participation in performance reviews, meeting KPIs, and supporting reporting aligned to performance measurement.

sections.section_purpose: To outline the approach to service delivery and transition.
sections.response_guidance: Describe how services will be delivered aligned to milestones, acceptance criteria, and support testing activities.

sections.section_purpose: To demonstrate relevant experience and alignment with Australian Industry Capability (AIC).
sections.response_guidance: Provide case studies demonstrating engagement with local businesses and alignment with Defence AIC policies.

sections.section_purpose: To list key personnel and their roles in service delivery.
sections.response_guidance: List personnel required to deliver services and any stand-down conditions.

sections.section_purpose: To provide a detailed pricing schedule.
sections.response_guidance: Provide pricing in accordance with the SOW pricing structure and compliance with payment arrangements.

sections.section_purpose: To state acceptance or deviations from contract terms.
sections.response_guidance: Comply with IP provisions defined in the SOW.
